reflection: Graph behavior now matches list behavior: ordinary aim and background clicks clear multi-selection; Ctrl/Cmd toggles membership; long-pressing an aim already in a multi-selection opens the bulk editor. Existing behavior for long-pressing an unselected aim remains unchanged pending user direction. Focused selection tests pass 31/31 and production frontend build passes.

status.comment: List and graph selection semantics plus staged bulk editing are aligned and verified; awaiting user acceptance.
